senses.gloss: paradise, heaven, the Paradise, the Heaven, Elysium

examples.english: from among the jinn/demons and Men.

senses.gloss: thing which veils, conceals, hides, covers, or protects
weapon or armor, a thing used to protect oneself, anything protective or defensive
piece of cloth which a woman wears covering the face and the two sides of the bosom, a type of hijab or veil

etymology.text: Inherited from Proto-Semitic, the sense of a paradise being borrowed from Classical Syriac ܓܰܢܬܳܐ (gannəṯā). Compare Hebrew גַּן (gan), Aramaic גִּנָּא (ginnā), Ugaritic 𐎂𐎐 (gn). Synchronically, related to جَنّ (jann, “covering, protecting”)
